---
title: "Week 1 — Foundations"
subtitle: "May 18 – 22, 2026"
---

This week we get everyone set up with R, RStudio, and Quarto, and cover the absolute basics of the R language. By Friday you'll have written your first reproducible document and learned the pipe — the core glue of tidyverse-style R.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Files |
|---|---|---|
| Mon May 18 | [Course intro & what is R?](day1-intro.qmd) | [View Slides](day1-intro.html) · [Download HTML](day1-intro.html){download=""} · [PDF](day1-intro.pdf), in-class code |
| Tue May 19 | [R, RStudio, console · vectors · types](day2-r-basics.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Wed May 20 | [Functions, packages · tidyverse](day3-functions-packages.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Thu May 21 | [Quarto basics](day4-quarto.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Fri May 22 | [**Quiz 1** · pipe and chaining syntax](day5-quiz-pipe.qmd) | quiz, in-class code |

## Readings due this week

- Before Mon: *Data Computing* Ch 1 (§1.1–1.5) — what tidy data is (conceptual)
- Before Tue: *Data Computing* Ch 2 (§2.1–2.8) — R, RStudio, vectors, objects
- Before Wed: *Data Computing* Ch 3 (§3.1–3.5) — basic R commands
- Before Thu: *Data Computing* Ch 4 (§4.1–4.7) — files and Quarto/Rmd documents
- Before Fri: *Data Computing* §3.6 — chaining syntax (the pipe)

## Assignments due this week

- **Reading Quiz 1** — due before Tuesday's class (Canvas)
- **HW 0** (setup confirmation) — due Thursday May 21, 11:59 p.m.
- **Quiz 1** — in class Friday May 22

## Heads up for next week

- *Data Computing* Ch 5 (§5.1–5.6) for Tuesday May 26 — graphics intro.
- No class Monday May 25 (Memorial Day).
